input.agent_prompt: Prospect: 'Just give me a ballpark — are we talking $500K or $1M for the year?' Draft response.

dimensions.name: no_commitment_language
dimensions.check: 'can commit' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'will provide' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'guarantee' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'confirmed' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'definitely' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-014] Pricing pressure even for 'ballpark'. Any specific number without authority = fail.
